creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text: When I use FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT on my Dell Inspiron 7352 with an aftermarket Sandisk X400 512GB SSD, and reboot the system, the screen and keyboard backlight turns on, but the BIOS does not show the Dell logo, nor does it boot into any operating system. This issue only happens on FreeBSD, and not on Windows or Linux. I had this issue with both UEFI and Legacy modes.
